creator: jhixson@FreeBSD.org
text:
My testing rig is a bit older and therefore it takes 6-8 hours compiling rust and llvm for each freebsd version I test. So, expect this to take all day ;-)

I haven't looked at either patch closely, however I do agree with Gleb on a preference for using FreeBSD procfs over linprocfs. I'll look at the patches closer later.
